offer: For insurance adjusters processing 10–20 claims/week, lack of timely updates causes delayed resolutions. We generate weekly claims status summaries instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets and emails.
problem: Lack of timely updates on claims status leads to delayed resolutions.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance adjusters
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to insurance adjusters with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools among adjusters
try_it: Let users try weekly summary generation and manual input for claims updates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
